stemHtml: How can FADEC systems on piston engines usually achieve a level of redundancy?

options.a: A piston engine FADEC is much more performant than a gas turbine one because of the lower operating costs.
options.b: Each engine is fitted with two FADEC computers.
options.c: Extra redundancy is achieved via a continuous operator monitoring system.
options.d: The FADEC architecture is equipped with a reinforced wiring system.
